title: Permission
description: A bounded, revocable permission grant. Defines what a grantee may do within a grantor's sovereign domain.

id.description: Unique identifier for this permission grant.

grantor.description: The sovereign identifier of the entity granting this permission.

grantee.description: The identifier of the entity receiving this permission.

granteeType.description: The type of the grantee entity.

scope.description: The resources or domains to which this permission applies. Use URIs or structured identifiers.

actions.description: The specific actions the grantee is permitted to perform.

conditions.description: Optional conditions that constrain when or how the permission may be exercised.

timeWindows.description: Time windows during which this permission is active (e.g., business hours only).

maxUses.description: Maximum number of times this permission may be exercised. Omit for unlimited.

requireApprovalAbove.description: Require grantor approval for actions that exceed specified thresholds.

purpose.description: The stated purpose for which this permission is granted. Grantee should only exercise permission for this purpose.

subdelegatable.description: Whether the grantee may delegate this permission to other entities. Defaults to false.

expires.description: When this permission expires. All permissions must have an expiry.

revoked.description: Whether this permission has been revoked before its expiry.

revokedAt.description: When this permission was revoked, if applicable.

auditRequired.description: Whether the grantee must maintain an audit log of actions taken under this permission.

parentPermission.description: If this permission was sub-delegated, the identifier of the parent permission.
